arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal, Aston Villa & Man City Possible Champions League Round of 16 Draws
arts.sum: All five British clubs made it through the League Phase of the Champions League - and now have a better idea of who they'll face in the next stage.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans are all saying the same thing about Federico Chiesa after PSV defeat
arts.sum: Liverpool are through to the last 16 of the Champions League as group-stage winners despite losing 3-2 at PSV Eindhoven. The Reds took the lead...

arts.ttl: 'It'll get done' - Liverpool given fresh hope for Mohamed Salah contract renewal
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is yet to commit his future to Liverpool amid ongoing contract talks

arts.ttl: PSV spoil Liverpool's perfect record in CL group
arts.sum: Liverpool's 100% record in the Champions League ended as they lost 3-2 at PSV Eindhoven on Wednesday but Arne Slot's side still finished top of the group stage.

arts.ttl: Roberton glad Liverpool avoided Champions League ‘carnage’
arts.sum: Andy Robertson has said he is glad Liverpool have avoided the ‘carnage’ of the Champions League’s matchday eight and playoff round. Liverpool lost for the first time in Europe this season after a 3-2 defeat at PSV Eindhoven. However, Arne Slot opted to field a second-string side in the Netherlands with the Reds already guaranteed […] The post Roberton glad Liverpool avoided Champions League ‘carnage’ first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: PSV 2-3 Liverpool: Player Ratings as Arne Slot Suffers First Champions League Loss
arts.sum: Liverpool's heavily rotated squad resulted in Arne Slot's first Champions League loss as manager.

arts.ttl: PSV 3-2 Liverpool: Amara Nallo sent off on debut as Reds lose 100% Champions League record
arts.sum: Reds still finish top of League phase as understrength side beaten

arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven 3-2 Liverpool: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Champions League table confirmed
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the highlights, man of the match, and stats from Wednesday's Champions League clash between PSV Eindhoven and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool finish top despite defeat at PSV
arts.sum: Liverpool's perfect run in this Champions League campaign came to an end with a 3-2 defeat at PSV - but Barcelona's draw at home to Atalanta meant Arne Slot's side finished the league phase in top spot.

arts.ttl: PSV 3-2 Liverpool: Player ratings as Reds surrender perfect European record
arts.sum: Player ratings from Liverpool's 3-2 defeat to PSV Eindhoven on matchday eight of the Champions League.
